creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Eimar,

thanks for your submission, however I could not reproduce the issue you
report here. When I committed the last update to p5-XML-LibXML I tested
it on several environments and everything was fine. I did it again when
I saw your PR and here are the logs proving it compiles fine:

on 9.1:
https://redports.org/~culot/20130722120942-63353-133721/p5-XML-LibXML-2.0018,1.log

on 8.4:
https://redports.org/~culot/20130722120400-9762-133720/p5-XML-LibXML-2.0018,1.log

So I suspect there's an issue with your environment.
May I ask you if you are up-to-date with regards to the UPDATING
instructions, especially the entry dated 20130612 which affects all
perl-related ports?

Cheers,
Frederic
